description: DatoCMS is a headless content management system. The datocms-assets.com domain is its shared asset-hosting domain used to deliver uploaded files like images and PDFs, with optional on-the-fly image transformations.
summary: datocms-assets.com exposes a public HTTP asset CDN surface for serving uploaded DatoCMS assets, including Imgix-style image transformation query parameters; no developer-authenticated API, GraphQL endpoint, MCP server, or CLI was found on this domain.
